questions.question_text: Critically examine the working of User Datagram Protocol with respect to connectionless communication and minimal overhead. How does UDP support real-time applications despite lacking reliability mechanisms?

Explain how intra-domain and inter-domain routing coordinate to achieve end-to-end packet delivery across heterogeneous networks. Give suitable illustrations showing routing across multiple Autonomous Systems.
Discuss the architecture and operational workflow of Multiprotocol Label Switching in contrast to conventional destination-based IP routing. Give suitable illustrations for the same.
Quantitatively different between Remote Access and Site-to-Site Virtual Private Networks based on bandwidth, latency, scalability and throughput metrics. Give suitable illustrations for the same.

Quantitatively differentiate between Proactive Routing Protocol and Reactive Routing Protocol in Mobile Ad-hoc Networks . Give suitable illustrations for the same. State their advantages and disadvantages respectively.
Critically examine the role of message prioritization in MaxProp Routing Protocol in Delay Tolerant Networks. Give suitable illustrations explaining the working of MaxProp Routing Protocol.

Cryptographically state and explain the significance of Extended Euclidean Algorithm in RSA Cryptosystem. By choosing the smallest two mutually coprime numbers, calculate the ciphertext for the plaintext “B” using RSA Cryptosystem while considering the fact that the mapping is Set X: {“A=1”, “B=2”, “C=3”,..……, “Y=25”, “Z=26”}, and finally decrypt the same to retrieve the plaintext “B”.
Write short note on any two of the following:- Digital signature and digital certificates Next Generation Firewall Key distribution protocols
